name: digi-pulse-backend
afterHooks: if docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -q 'digipulse-app'; then docker pull ghcr.io/yurij2015/digipulse-backend && docker restart digipulse-app digipulse-worker digipulse-scheduler && sleep 10 && docker exec digipulse-app php artisan config:cache && docker exec digipulse-app php artisan route:cache; else echo 'Containers not found. Run terraform apply first.'; fi
